results.rendered_html:
abhipreta p. p.
1 Meant, aimed at, intended; designed; atrāyamartho'bhipretaḥ; kimabhipretamanayā  Bh. 3. 67 ; nivedayābhipretaṃ  Pt. 1. 
2 Wished, desired; yathābhipretamanuṣṭhīyatāṃ  H. 1. 
3 Approved, accepted; pūrvairayamabhipreto gato mārgonugamyate  Rām. 
4 Dear or agreeable to, favourite with, beloved; dharmastavābhipretaḥ  Dk. 42 ;  Ś. 6. 
5 Wishing.
